scope: Next sparse-MLA dKV producer decision after sidecar attribution and an on-the-fly prob/scaled-dP schedule test

mode19_const_qgo_real_probdp_checksum.read: Attribution only: removes contribution-stage q/grad_output global reloads.

mode20_const_qgo_const_probdp_checksum.read: Attribution only: removes contribution-stage q/grad_output global reloads and prob/scaled-dP shared replay.

mode21_onfly_probdp_real_qgo_checksum.read: Real schedule variant: skips BF16 prob/scaled-dP shared-page reads and derives prob/scaled-dP from the float score/dO.V page inside each contribution setup. It keeps real q/grad_output reloads and checksum output.

read.sidecar_metadata: Not the wall. Duplicate sidecar preload and sidecar use were within timing noise of the baseline.
read.q_grad_output_replay: Major wall. Removing contribution-stage q and grad_output global reloads by replacing them with constants cut mode15 from 21.47 ms to 11.72 ms, attributing about 9.76 ms.
read.prob_scaled_dp_replay: Second wall. Removing contribution-stage prob/scaled-dP shared reads after q/go constants cut 11.72 ms to 7.57 ms, attributing about 4.14 ms.
read.on_the_fly_prob_scaled_dp: Rejected. Recomputing exp/scale from the float score page for every contribution D block produced 33.87 ms, worse than the 21.47 ms BF16 page replay baseline.

decision.why: The useful target is still resident consumption, but it cannot mean recomputing prob/scaled-dP per D block. The kernel has to compute prob/scaled-dP once per (token, selected slot, head) and consume it before it leaves registers/LDS, while also avoiding contribution-stage q/grad_output global replay. That requires a deeper cooperative or persistent producer-consumer shape, not the current one-CTA score-page replay loop.
decision.next_kernel_contract: Build a producer where the score/dO.V wave computes prob and scaled-dP once, then hands that small H/K tile to D-block consumers by warp-register shuffle or a persistent same-workgroup pipeline. q and grad_output D tiles must be loaded once per token/head/D tile and reused across selected slots before final group-aware dKV reduction and global atomics.
do_not_retry: Do not retry mode21-style on-the-fly prob/scaled-dP recompute per D block.
Do not tune sidecar preload placement as the main lever.
Do not materialize a global prob/scaled-dP slab before the dKV producer.
